creator: nemysis@gmx.ch
text:
- Update to 0.12.1
- Take maintainership

Added file(s):
- files/pkg-message.in

Makefile changed:
+MASTER_SITES=
+DISTFILES=
+DIST_SUBDIR=	${PORTNAME}
+EXTRACT_ONLY=
+LICENSE=	ZLIB
+EXTRACT_DEPENDS=unzip:${PORTSDIR}/archivers/unzip
+LEVELS=
+LEVELS_XYE=
+DESKTOP_ENTRIES=
+SUB_FILES=	 pkg-message
+OPTIONS_DEFINE=	DOCS
+.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
+post-extract-script:
 post-patch:
+post-install:

Port maintainer (gogo@cs.uni-sb.de) is cc'd.

Generated and tested manually, tested with port test, sent with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.99_6 (mode: update, diff: ports)

How-To-Repeat: 
portlint -A
WARN: Makefile: [65]: use ${VARIABLE}, instead of $(VARIABLE).
WARN: Makefile: for new port, make $FreeBSD$ tag in comment section empty, to make SVN happy.
0 fatal errors and 2 warnings found.

WARN: Makefile: [65] because is used
	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|docedir = $$(datadir)|docedir = ${PREFIX}/share/doc|' ${WRKSRC}/Makefile.in

port test: clean

Can't give build log, because RedPorts not works at the time.
